Operation 'createpaymentintent' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Description lacks specificity about expected inputs (amount, currency, description), what the response contains (ID, status), and the side effect of creating a new record. These details are critical for AI agents to understand when and how to use this operation.

data.current_description: Creates a new PaymentIntent resource to initiate a payment flow.
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new PaymentIntent resource to initiate a payment flow in the Philippines. Accepts payment details including amount, currency, and description. Returns a PaymentIntent object with a unique ID and status. The created intent can be used to process payments through various payment methods. Side effects: A new payment intent record is created in the system.
data.reasoning: Description lacks specificity about expected inputs (amount, currency, description), what the response contains (ID, status), and the side effect of creating a new record. These details are critical for AI agents to understand when and how to use this operation.

message: Operation 'retrievepaymentintent' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_context. Description is too minimal. It doesn't explain what information is returned (status, amount, currency), the use case for retrieving an intent, or clarify that it's a read-only operation. data.current_description: Retrieves an existing PaymentIntent by its ID.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves an existing PaymentIntent by its unique ID. Returns the complete PaymentIntent object including current status, amount, currency, and payment details. Use this operation to check the status of a payment intent or retrieve its details for processing. No side effects - this is a read-only operation.

data.current_description: Returns a paginated list of payment resources.
data.description_suggestion: Returns a paginated list of payment resources. Supports filtering by status, date range, and amount. Accepts pagination parameters (limit, offset) to control result set size and position. Returns a PaymentListResponse containing an array of payment objects with details including ID, amount, status, and timestamp. Use this operation to retrieve payment history or search for specific payments.

message: Operation 'createcheckoutsession' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Description is vague about inputs (line items, customer info, URLs), outputs (session ID, checkout URL), and side effects. AI agents need to understand what data to provide and what they'll receive back to use this operation effectively.

data.current_description: Creates a new checkout session for collecting payments.
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new checkout session for collecting payments from customers. Accepts line items with product details, quantities, and prices, along with customer information and success/cancel redirect URLs. Returns a CheckoutSessionResponse containing a session ID and checkout URL. The checkout URL can be shared with customers to complete payment. Side effects: A new checkout session is created and stored in the system.
data.reasoning: Description is vague about inputs (line items, customer info, URLs), outputs (session ID, checkout URL), and side effects. AI agents need to understand what data to provide and what they'll receive back to use this operation effectively.

data.current_description: Creates a new refund for an existing payment.
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new refund for an existing payment. Requires the payment ID and optionally an amount (full refund if not specified). Returns a RefundResponse containing the refund ID, status, amount, and timestamp. The refund is processed asynchronously and status can be checked via the refund ID. Side effects: A refund record is created and the payment status is updated to reflect the refund.
